canonical_definition: A text-based navigation task in which an agent must choose moves in a maze, including partially observed and fully observed variants.

relationships.paper: Imagine While Reasoning in Space: Multimodal Visualization-of-Thought
relationships.evidence: We validate MVoT’s effectiveness through controlled experiments across three dynamic spatial reasoning tasks. MAZE (Ivanitskiy et al., 2023) and MINIBEHAVIOR (Jin et al., 2023) focus on interactions with spatial layouts. (1. Introduction)
